---
title: "Estimation and Diagnostics Workflow"
---

This page will apply the estimation workflow to the prepared SAE inputs from the National Survey for Wales example.

The applied workflow will cover:

-   calculating direct estimates and sampling variances,
-   checking sample sizes and unstable domains,
-   fitting area-level SAE models,
-   comparing direct and modelled estimates,
-   diagnosing uncertainty and residual patterns,
-   preparing outputs for reporting.

The data preparation step should produce the respondent-level indicator table and domain-size table needed here.
